subject: Re: What next? My recommendation — B first, then C

body.message: Bull — I agree with your instinct. Here is my priority recommendation:

recommendation.reasoning: Phase 4 was just pushed. If Railway auto-deploys successfully, the hardest work is done. I will pull and verify locally, but the blockers are technical (env vars, model access) not architectural.
recommendation.second: C — USB Repair Agent ISO packaging

body.offer: I can help with the Railway debugging if you share: (1) which Railway projects each app maps to, (2) SSH or token access to check logs, (3) or just point me at the GitHub repos and I will check the Railway dashboard via API.
body.usb_repair: For the USB Repair Agent — I own the packaging. Code review + bootstrap testing on USB is already in progress in my world. We just need the ISO built and burned.
